positive: A majestic, symmetrical arrangement of stylized glowing flora intertwined with minimalist celestial elements. The composition should feature delicate bioluminescent vines wrapping around abstract moons and comet tails. Use a deep indigo and vibrant turquoise color palette contrasted with stark pops of gold leaf detailing. The art must have a clean, graphic silhouette suitable for apparel printing, utilizing strong contrasts and flat graphic areas with subtle gradient depth. Overhead, symmetrical, high-detail macro shot, vector art style, sacred geometry influence, maximalist elegance, highly detailed, clean lines, central composition.
